content.text: I'll start by understanding the project state and checking for any ud-audit-agent related artifacts, then run the test suite once and cache the results.

{
  "name": "@ai-eng-system/workspace",
  "version": "1.6.4",
  "description": "AI Engineering System: AI-powered engineering automation with comprehensive research, validation, and deployment workflows",
  "private": true,
  "type": "module",
  "workspaces": [
    "packages/*"
  ],
  "main": "dist/index.js",
  "bin": {
    "ai-eng-install": "scripts/install.js"
  },
  "files": [
    "dist",
    ".opencode",
    ".claude",
    ".claude-plugin"
  ],
  "exports": {
    ".": {
      "import": "./dist/index.js"
    },
    "./agents": {
      "import": "./dist/agents/index.js"
    }
  },
  "homepage": "https://github.com/v1truv1us/ai-eng-system",
  "repository": {
    "type": "git",
    "url": "https://github.com/v1truv1us/ai-eng-system"
  },
  "bugs": {
    "url": "https://github.com/v1truv1us/ai-eng-system/issues"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "build": "bun scripts/build-all.ts",
    "build:core": "cd packages/core && bun run build && cd ../.. && cp -r packages/core/opencode packages/core/dist/.opencode",
    "sync:core-dist": "cp -r packages/toolkit/.opencode/* packages/core/dist/.opencode/ 2>/dev/null; cp -r packages/toolkit/.claude-plugin/* packages/cli/dist/.claude-plugin/ 2>/dev/null; echo '\u2705 Synced toolkit output to core/cli dist'",
    "build:cli": "cd packages/cli && bun run build:cli",
    "build:briefs": "cd packages/daily-brief-sdk && bun run build",
    "copy:content": "cp packages/core/dist/index.js dist/ && cp packages/core/dist/*.d.ts dist/",
    "build:toolkit": "bun run build.ts && bun scripts/build-toolkit.ts",
    "build:watch": "bun run build && cd packages/cli && bun run build:cli --watch",
    "clean": "rm -rf packages/core/dist && rm -rf dist",
    "validate": "bun run build && cd packages/cli && bun run validate",
    "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit",
    "typecheck:plugin": "tsc -p tsconfig.plugin.json",
    "lint": "biome check . --diagnostic-level=error",
    "lint:fix": "biome check --write .",
    "format": "biome format --write .",
    "format:skills": "bun scripts/format-skills.ts",
    "format:skills:fix": "bun scripts/format-skills.ts --fix",
    "verify:cursor-plugins": "bun scripts/verify-cursor-plugins-coverage.ts",
    "verify:cursor-install": "bun scripts/verify-cursor-install-artifacts.ts",
    "verify:all-platform-installs": "bun scripts/verify-all-platform-installs.ts",
    "test": "bun test",
    "test:unit": "bun test tests/unit.test.ts",
    "test:build": "bun test tests/build.test.ts",
    "test:execution": "bun test tests/execution/*.test.ts",
    "test:context": "bun test tests/context/*.test.ts",
    "test:cli": "bun test tests/cli/*.test.ts",
    "test:runner": "bun run test-runner.ts",
    "test:watch": "bun test --watch",
    "test:coverage": "bun test --coverage",
    "install:global": "bun scripts/install.js --global",
    "install:local": "bun scripts/install.js --local",
    "eval:run": "bun run benchmarks/evaluation/runner.ts",
    "eval:dry": "DRY_RUN=true bun run benchmarks/evaluation/runner.ts",
    "update-publish-versions": "bun scripts/update-publish-versions.ts",
    "prepublish:cli": "bun scripts/prepublish-cli.ts",
    "postpublish:cli": "bun scripts/postpublish-cli.ts",
    "publish:core": "cd packages/core && bun publish --access public --provenance",
    "publish:core:dry-run": "cd packages/core && bun publish --dry-run --access public --provenance",
    "publish:toolkit": "cd packages/toolkit && bun publish --access public --provenance",
    "publish:toolkit:dry-run": "cd packages/toolkit && bun publish --dry-run --access public --provenance",
    "publish:cli": "bun scripts/publish-cli.ts",
    "publish:cli:dry-run": "bun scripts/publish-cli.ts --dry-run",
    "publish:packages": "bun run publish:core && bun run publish:toolkit && bun run publish:cli"
  },
  "keywords": [
    "ai",
    "engineering",
    "automation",
    "research",
    "validation",
    "deployment",
    "agents",
    "opencode"
  ],
  "author": "John Ferguson",
  "license": "MIT",
  "dependencies": {
    "@ai-eng-system/core": "workspace:*",
    "@opencode-ai/plugin": "^1.15.10",
    "@opencode-ai/sdk": "^1.15.10",
    "ai-eng-system": "^0.4.0",
    "yaml": "^2.9.0"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@types/bun": "1.3.12",
    "@types/node": "^25.9.1",
    "typescript": "^6.0.3"
  },
  "engines": {
    "node": ">=20.0.0",
    "bun": ">=1.0.0"
  }
}
Now I'll run the full test suite once and cache the results:
